title: Rt-PCR curves of RNA template extracted from biofilm state with and without exposure to Quorum-sensing molecules C8HSL at 0.2mM. Images A-I; SdiA, CsgD, FlgG, rck, bapA, FimA, HilA, InvA and the housekeeping gene 16s rRNA.
author: Fernandes, Schnieder
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the PCR cycles and relative fluorescence unit (RFU) values obtained from RT-PCR amplification curves for eight  Salmonella enterica  genes involved in biofilm formation and virulence regulation ( sdiA, csgD, rck, bapA, FimA, HilA, InvA,  and  FlgG ). 
 Each gene was analyzed under four experimental conditions: 
 
 
  S. enteritidis  (SE) with C8HSL (quorum sensing signal) 
 
 
  S. enteritidis  (SE) without C8HSL 
 
 
  S. Typhimurium  14028 (ST14028) with C8HSL 
 
 
  S. Typhimurium  14028 (ST14028) without C8HSL 
 
 
 The dataset provides raw amplification data (Pcr cycles vs RFU) reflecting transcriptional responses to quorum sensing modulation.
